content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 SuperPlane: DevRel - Content Creator Anywhere in the World Delaware Technical Writing, DevOps, Content Creation, CI/CD Pipelines, and AI Agents Sales and Marketing Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/4898/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> USA <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://superplane.com">https://superplane.com</a> </p> <p>SuperPlane is an open source control plane where AI agents and engineers run operations together. We're a team of 10, founded by the creators of Semaphore CI/CD. Our users are DevOps and platform engineers at mid-size to large engineering orgs.</p> <p>We have a product engineers love, an open source repo with 2K+ stars, and events in the pipeline. What we don't have is someone dedicated to showing the world what SuperPlane can do. We ship fast but our content doesn't keep up. We need someone who can turn what we build into blog posts, tutorials, demos, and videos that resonate with practitioners.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <h2>What you'll own</h2> <p>This is our first DevRel hire. Your priorities, in order:</p> <p><strong>1. Video content</strong>: Create screencasts, product walkthroughs, and video demos that show SuperPlane in action. You're comfortable on camera and can produce polished content without a production team.</p> <p><strong>2. Technical content</strong>: Build working use cases and turn them into blog posts, tutorials, and guides. The typical flow: explore the product, develop a real workflow, write it up, then turn it into a video.</p> <p><strong>3. Community presence</strong>: Be SuperPlane's voice in our Discord, on Reddit, Hacker News, and relevant DevOps Slack groups. Welcome new users, answer questions, surface interesting discussions, and represent us in a natural, non-salesy way.</p> <p><strong>4. Events (occasional)</strong>: Represent SuperPlane at conferences or meetups a few times per year.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <h2>What success looks like</h2> <p>In the first 6 months:</p> <ul> <li> <p>A consistent publishing cadence: written content and videos shipping weekly</p> </li> <li> <p>Content that drives meaningful traffic and signups from organic search and social media shares</p> </li> <li> <p>Active, visible presence in community channels where our users hang out</p> </li> <li> <p>A growing library of use-case demos that the sales and product teams can reference</p> </li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <h2>You're a fit if</h2> <ul> <li> <p><strong>You have a DevOps or platform engineering background.</strong>&nbsp;You've managed deployments, written CI pipelines, used tools like Terraform or Kubernetes. You could still be an engineer if you wanted to, but you prefer making content.</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>You can write working code.</strong>&nbsp;Your tutorials include real, runnable examples. You can spin up a staging environment, write a Lambda function, or put together a working pipeline without needing an engineer to pair with.</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>You have deep product intuition.</strong>&nbsp;You pick up a tool and immediately start exploring what's possible. You think in workflows and use cases, not feature lists.</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>You're curious and self-directed.</strong>&nbsp;You find the next interesting thing to talk about on your own. You follow the right people, notice opportunities, and don't wait to be told what to write.</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>You can produce video content.</strong>&nbsp;Screencasts, walkthroughs, short demos. You don't need a production team. You can do this solo with good tools.</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>You use AI tools daily.&nbsp;</strong>Coding agents, LLMs for drafting and review, AI-assisted prototyping. You see these as basic infrastructure for doing good work.</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>You're comfortable working async in a distributed team</strong>.</p> </li> </ul> <h2>Logistics</h2> <ul> <li> <p><strong>Remote-first.</strong>&nbsp;We support co-working costs if needed.</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>Timezone:</strong>&nbsp;GMT-5 to GMT+3 (US East Coast through Europe).</p> </li> </ul> <p><strong>Compensation:</strong>&nbsp;Early-stage startup salary (not FAANG rates) plus significant equity in a company with real traction and experienced founders. If you're looking for a safe big-company paycheck, this isn't it. If you want meaningful ownership in something that's working, let's talk.</p> <p>We welcome candidates of all backgrounds, genders, orientations, ethnicities, ages, and abilities. If you're looking for a place to do your best work and know your contributions are valued, you'll feel right at home here.</p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/superplane-devrel-content-creator">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/superplane-devrel-content-creator</a></p> Thu, 14 May 2026 15:28:14 +0000 Sat, 13 Jun 2026 15:28:14 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/superplane-devrel-content-creator https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/superplane-devrel-content-creator Sticker Mule: Software engineer Anywhere in the World New York TypeScript and Go Full-Stack Programming Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0018/9370/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> New York, NY <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.stickermule.com">https://www.stickermule.com</a> </p> <p>Sticker Mule is building the Internet's most lucrative commerce platform by combining software, manufacturing, and AI into one fully integrated stack. No print company, or pure software company for that matter, can match what we're doing. We're privately owned, profitable, and doing 9-figures in annual revenue with no meddlesome investors.</p> <div>&nbsp;</div> <h2><strong>How we work</strong></h2> <ol> <li> <p>Small, autonomous teams that own products end-to-end.</p> </li> <li> <p>Prioritize what matters right now and pivot instantly when needed.</p> </li> <li> <p>Ship across web and mobile from the same codebase. We use Go, TypeScript, React, Expo, GraphQL, Postgres, and run on GCP.</p> </li> <li> <p>Use AI aggressively to push the limit of what we can do.</p> </li> <li> <p>Move fast, build for the masses, and deprioritize edge cases.</p> </li> <li> <p>Fully remote from 40+ countries and collaborate using Asana and Slack.</p> </li> </ol> <div>&nbsp;</div> <h2><strong>Requirements</strong></h2> <ol> <li> <p>You are an exceptional full-stack software engineer.<
